prompt:
Help frame the research described in the benchmark case as a concrete business-research problem. Preserve the supplied model and identify claims or information that remain unsupported.

Condition instructions:
Use the current frame-business-research-problem Skill at skills/frame-business-research-problem/. Follow its readiness, fidelity, managerial-framing, scholarly-positioning, evidence, boundary, and mode instructions. Use only the serialized case material.

Benchmark case:
```json
{
  "adversarial": false,
  "decision_time_facts": [
    "classifier score",
    "estimated conditional score distributions",
    "loss weights"
  ],
  "domain": "IS",
  "evidence_needs": [
    {
      "claim": "Moderation improves community health",
      "source_needed": true,
      "status": "unsupported_claim"
    }
  ],
  "fidelity_requirements": [
    "Classification is imperfect",
    "Scope is immediate classification loss"
  ],
  "hard_failure_traps": [
    "unsupported_causal_claim",
    "hidden_major_assumption"
  ],
  "id": "is-04",
  "model_specification": {
    "constraints": [
      "single threshold"
    ],
    "decision_variables": [
      "moderation score threshold"
    ],
    "mathematical_objective": "minimize expected false-removal and harmful-retention loss",
    "mechanism": "Moving the threshold trades false removals against harmful content retained.",
    "model_type": "classification-threshold optimization",
    "state_variables": [
      "latent content class",
      "classifier score",
      "removal outcome"
    ],
    "uncertainty": "content class and score"
  },
  "prohibited_inferences": [
    "The threshold causally improves long-run community trust"
  ],
  "prompt": "A platform chooses a removal threshold for user posts based on a noisy classifier score. Removed benign posts and retained harmful posts carry different modeled losses. Write a decision-focused narrative that acknowledges classification error and does not claim causal effects on long-run community health.",
  "tags": [
    "content-moderation",
    "classification",
    "digital-rules"
  ],
  "title": "Content moderation threshold under classification error"
}
```
